note: Analysis plan and decision rule frozen before computation (geo15-style). Thresholds are project-management rules, not preregistered criteria. Seed labels follow the project's date-like naming convention; they are labels, not timestamps.
label: TEST 1: leave-one-source-out robustness of the four-driver reduction and core-magnitude residual
bootstrap: 2000 family resamples, 5/95 percentiles (matches frozen hunt09 recipe)
holds_rule: HOLDS iff, in every variant: (a) the arm-domain core-magnitude residual 90% family-bootstrap CI contains 0 OR |mean| < 0.005; (b) driver sign structure unchanged: raw arm dTail > +0.02, de-rounded and deep-strip residuals in (-0.05, +0.005), |core-indexed| < 0.005. Report per-domain family counts beside every corpus-level claim.
